title: Geckolib-Unofficial
description: Unofficial version of Geckolib for 1.7.10 version
body:
# Geckolib-Unofficial: An Immersive Animation Library for Minecraft Mods
Overview: Geckolib-Unofficial represents a dynamic unofficial adaptation of Geckolib-3 for 1.7.10. This library delivers a comprehensive array of useful features for Minecraft modders seeking to integrate captivating custom animations into their gameplay.

## Functionality:

- Custom Animation Integration: Empowering modders to incorporate personalized animated models created in BlockBench.
- Diverse Animation Support: Enabling keyframe-based animations, 30+ easings for smooth transitions, mathematical animations based on the straightforward Molang language, and custom keyframes for playing sound effects and emitting particles.
- Bedrock Particle System Integration: Geckolib-Unofficial seamlessly integrates with bedrock particle systems, offering a robust and versatile toolset to craft tailor-made visual effects, adding depth and richness to the Minecraft experience.

## Benefits for Modders:

- Empowering Creativity: Providing modders with the flexibility and tools to unleash their creativity, enhancing the immersive qualities of the Minecraft modding experience.
- Immersive Customization: Elevating the level of customization and engagement by enabling the creation of unique and captivating animations within Minecraft mods.
- Application in the Modding Community: Geckolib-Unofficial serves as an invaluable resource for modders, enriching the Minecraft modding landscape by enabling the seamless integration and creation of captivating custom animations, ultimately enhancing the overall gaming experience with its immersive visual and auditory elements.
